name: CLARIVATE PLC
summary: PART I . Clarivate Plc is a public limited company incorporated on January 7, 2019 under the laws of Jersey, Channel Islands. Our principal business offices are located at 70 St. Mary Axe, London EC3A 8BE, United Kingdom, and our main telephone number is +44 207 433 4000. We maintain a registered office at 4th Floor, St Pauls Gate, 22-24 New Street, St. Helier, Jersey JE14TR.
